sevenDayForecast.headline: Potential low forming in northern Timor Sea region next week.
points: Although there is currently little tropical thunderstorm activity north of Australia, some model guidance indicates that a tropical low (03U) may form in the Timor Sea region early to mid-next week.
Should a low form, the environmental conditions are favourable for development. The likelihood of a tropical cyclone forming increases to Low 10% from Tuesday onwards.
The most likely movement is to the west southwest with 03U remaining well off the north of the Kimberley coast.
